listOfQuestions.question: In Geology and Minerals, what does "Mineral" mean?
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A naturally occurring inorganic solid with a defined structure
wrongAnswers: Resistance of a mineral to scratching
Rock or mineral containing useful material that can be extracted
A carbonate mineral that reacts with acid

A coarse-grained igneous rock
